itunes_results.name: Headspace
itunes_results.note: Meditation/mindfulness — not creativity science

itunes_results.name: Fabulous: Daily Habit Tracker
itunes_results.note: Habit building — not creativity/genius-focused

daily_creative_genius_streak.gap_note: No streak app teaching the psychology of creative genius: Csikszentmihalyi, Wallas incubation model, divergent vs convergent thinking, biographical genius patterns. Zero direct competition.

itunes_results.name: Brain.fm
itunes_results.note: Focus music — not flow state science education

itunes_results.name: Focus@Will
itunes_results.note: Music for focus — no educational content

daily_flow_state_streak.gap_note: Mihaly Csikszentmihalyi's flow research is widely cited but no app teaches its daily science: autotelic experience, challenge-skill balance, flow triggers, 8 components. Brain.fm occupies music niche, not education.

itunes_results.name: Elevate - Brain Training
itunes_results.note: Language/math games — not divergent thinking science

itunes_results.name: Peak - Brain Training
itunes_results.note: Brain games — not creativity psychology

daily_divergent_thinking_streak.gap_note: Divergent thinking research (Guilford, Torrance, de Bono) has no dedicated streak app. Elevate trains math/language, not creative ideation. Zero education apps on TTCT, associative thinking, remote associates.

itunes_results.name: Blinkist
itunes_results.note: Book summaries — not polymath frameworks or biographical analysis

itunes_results.name: Instaread Book Summaries
itunes_results.note: Book summaries — not focused on genius/polymath study methods

daily_polymath_habits_streak.gap_note: No app studies the daily habits of Da Vinci, Newton, Leibniz, Feynman, Tesla, Lovelace through a psychological lens. Blinkist covers books broadly. Massive reddit/history community overlap for a daily polymath lesson format.

itunes_results.name: Woebot Health
itunes_results.note: CBT for anxiety/depression — not creative blocks

itunes_results.name: Calm
itunes_results.note: Meditation — not specifically creative resistance

daily_creative_blocks_streak.gap_note: Steven Pressfield's Resistance, Cameron's Morning Pages, perfectionism science, creative anxiety — no streak app covers the psychology of creative blocks. Writing (2.3M) + Art (4.1M) communities are ideal targets.

itunes_results.name: MasterClass
itunes_results.note: Video courses — not daily bite-sized innovation psychology

itunes_results.name: Coursera
itunes_results.note: Structured courses — not daily micro-lessons on innovation

daily_innovation_psychology_streak.gap_note: The psychology behind disruptive innovation: T-shaped knowledge, analogical reasoning, first-principles thinking, associative combinatorics (Johansson's Medici Effect). No streak app. Business/startup communities (6.6M) crave this.

itunes_results.name: Simply Piano by JoyTunes
itunes_results.note: Piano lessons — not the science of musical genius

itunes_results.name: Yousician
itunes_results.note: Instrument learning — not musical intelligence science

daily_musical_genius_streak.gap_note: The neuroscience of musical genius (perfect pitch, amusia, prodigy studies, Suzuki method science, Mozart effect debunked properly) has no dedicated streak app. Music theory apps teach notes; none teach the psychology of musical cognition.

itunes_results.name: Headspace
itunes_results.note: Meditation — not imagination science

itunes_results.name: Waking Up with Sam Harris
itunes_results.note: Meditation/philosophy — not specifically imagination neuroscience

daily_imagination_science_streak.gap_note: Default Mode Network research, mental simulation science, episodic future thinking, counterfactual reasoning — all active neuroscience fields with zero dedicated streak education apps. The science of imagination is separate from mindfulness.

itunes_results.name: Notion
itunes_results.note: Note-taking — not structured creativity frameworks

itunes_results.name: Miro: Visual Collaboration
itunes_results.note: Whiteboard tool — not educational frameworks

daily_creative_problem_solving_streak.gap_note: TRIZ, SCAMPER, design thinking, IDEO methods, biomimicry, lateral thinking — structured creative problem-solving has zero dedicated daily streak education app. Engineer/designer communities (8.5M aggregate) actively seek these frameworks.

itunes_results.name: 16Personalities
itunes_results.note: Personality typing — not cognitive style science

itunes_results.name: Crystal
itunes_results.note: Personality profiles — not daily cognitive science education

daily_cognitive_style_streak.gap_note: Field dependence/independence, holistic vs analytic thinking, verbalizer vs visualizer, sensory modality research — cognitive style science has no dedicated streak app. MBTI (640K) community seeks deeper science beyond personality types.
